title: ore border
description: This resource pack changes Minecraft minerals to make them more visible while maintaining the vanilla Minecraft style.
body:
# ore border

**This resource pack changes Minecraft minerals to make them more visible while maintaining the vanilla Minecraft style.**

## Features

- **Add ore border.**
- **Compatible with versions 1.20.X**
- **Compatible with Sodium and Optifine.**

## 
![]()
